whatsNew: Assignments and Witness Testimonies now have matching course headers.
Added a fifth EPA course tab with three course-specific mock assessments.
The EPA knowledge mock draws 40 randomised questions from the course KSB bank, requires 90% and disables HintMate.
The EPA practical mock uses a 1–3 readiness scale with automatic development feedback.
The EPA professional discussion provides 10 demanding coach-led verbal scenarios.
